creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here are the failures for test_read_format_zip_high_compression.c:

test_read_format_zip_high_compression

/usr/src/svn/contrib/libarchive/libarchive/test/test_read_format_zip_high_compression.c:65: ARCHIVE_OK != archive_read_data_block(a, &pv, &s, &o)
      ARCHIVE_OK=0 (0x0, 00)
      archive_read_data_block(a, &pv, &s, &o)=-30 (0xffffffffffffffe2, 01777777777777777777742)
/usr/src/svn/contrib/libarchive/libarchive/test/test_read_format_zip_high_compression.c:66: 160 != s
      160=160 (0xa0, 0240)
      s=0 (0x0, 00)
/usr/src/svn/contrib/libarchive/libarchive/test/test_read_format_zip_high_compression.c:69: ARCHIVE_EOF != archive_read_data_block(a, &pv, &s, &o)
      ARCHIVE_EOF=1 (0x1, 01)
      archive_read_data_block(a, &pv, &s, &o)=-30 (0xffffffffffffffe2, 01777777777777777777742)
